expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: result.md states the focus areas are not demonstrated via shipment checkpoint artifacts: "Because Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts are absent, explicit checkpoint coverage of the focus areas is not demonstrated" and lists hyperlink styling/contextual navigation as "not checkpoint-audited" and fallback rendering safety as "Not evidenced".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md indicates Phase 5b execution/alignment cannot be verified due to missing required Phase 5b deliverables: "there is no run output showing Phase 5b execution" and "alignment to Phase 5b deliverables and gates cannot be verified." execution_notes.md similarly lists missing Phase 5b artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b, spawn manifest).
